data.title: The U.S. Conference Board Consumer Confidence Index for December was 89.1, below the expected 91.
data.description: The U.S. Conference Board Consumer Confidence Index for December was 89.1, below the expected 91 and the previous reading of 88.7. (Jinshi)

data.title: A newly created wallet withdrew 240 SOL from Coinbase and then bought 6.31 million WhiteWhale.
data.description: According to Lookonchain's monitoring, after The White Whale Meme announced that it would give away 100,000 USDC to WhiteWhale holders, someone created a new wallet and withdrew 240 SOL (approximately $30,200) from Coinbase, and then bought 6.31 million WhiteWhale.

data.title: Arkham: The "die-hard short whale" has made $12.5 million in profits over the past two months.
data.description: According to Arkham monitoring, the "hardcore short whale" at address 0x5d2 realized and unrealized profits of $12.5 million through two months of Bitcoin short trading. The trading began at the end of October, with a total short position of $63.6 million. In addition, the account accumulated $9.6 million in funding fees during this trading activity, while also holding $3.5 million worth of BTCB (Bitcoin assets on the BNB chain).

data.title: Bitcoin(BTC) Drops Below 87,000 USDT with a 3.71% Decrease in 24 Hours
data.description: On Dec 23, 2025, 14:55 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Bitcoin has dropped below 87,000 USDT and is now trading at 86,875 USDT, with a narrowed 3.71% decrease in 24 hours.

data.title: After a three-month hiatus, a trader deposited 600,000 USDC into Hyperliquid to open a long position in Ethereum.
data.description: According to Onchain Lens monitoring, after a three-month hiatus, a trader deposited 600,000 USDC into Hyperliquid to open a 25x leveraged long position in Ethereum. The current position is 5,063 ETH, with a liquidation price of $2,882.84.

data.title: Over $70 million in liquidations occurred across the entire network in the past hour, with over $25 million in BTC liquidations.
data.description: According to Coinglass data, approximately $71.25 million in positions were liquidated across the network in the past hour, including $70.07 million in long positions and $1.18 million in short positions. In addition, $25.01 million in BTC positions were liquidated and $21.21 million in ETH positions were liquidated.

data.title: The market currently believes there is only about a 17% chance that the Federal Reserve will cut interest rates at its meeting on January 28.
data.description: Investors have reduced their bets on a Federal Reserve rate cut next year, with the market now viewing the probability of a rate cut at the Fed's January 28 meeting at only about 17%. (Jinshi)

data.title: Crypto News: Is the Privacy Coin Rally Losing Momentum?
data.description: Key Takeaways:Privacy coins price slide as SCRT, ZEC, and DASH underperform the crypto marketRegulatory pressure increases risks for privacy-focused digital assetsBitcoin dominance at 59%, weighing on altcoin and privacy narrativesSource: CoinGeckoPrivacy Coins Reverse After November’s Strong OutperformancePrivacy coins recently showed strong bullish momentum, outperforming as Bitcoin price and major altcoins stalled. That trend has now reversed. Secret (SCRT) fell 4.4% in 24 hours, Dash (DASH) dropped 3.3%, and Zcash (ZEC) retraced sharply after a multi-month rally.The pullback coincides with a broader market slowdown, with the total crypto market down roughly 2.5%. Thin holiday liquidity has intensified selling pressure, particularly in smaller-cap assets. Regulatory Pressure Weighs On Privacy NarrativeRising regulatory scrutiny is a central theme across privacy coin news. In the U.S., the proposed SAFE Crypto Act increases oversight of crypto transactions, indirectly pressuring privacy-focused projects. In Europe, upcoming EU AML rules threaten features like Dash’s PrivateSend. Technical Weakness And Liquidation RiskFrom a technical perspective, conditions remain fragile. SCRT price is down 31.33% over 30 days and trades below key averages, with RSI at 34.83 and bearish MACD momentum. Low volume, down 63% in 24 hours, has worsened volatility.ZEC price suffered a sharp retracement after failing near a key Fibonacci level. Over $1.44 million in long liquidations occurred within 12 hours, reflecting overcrowded positioning. DASH price broke below $39.16 support, with RSI near 35, confirming a broader downtrend. Market Context: Bitcoin Dominance And Altcoin FatigueThe wider environment remains challenging for privacy assets. Bitcoin dominance at 59% and a Fear & Greed Index at 29 show defensive positioning across the crypto market. The Altcoin Season Index at 17 highlights capital rotation away from smaller tokens.Source: CoinMarketCapWhile privacy fundamentals remain intact, near-term flows favor Bitcoin amid high levels of macro uncertainty. Outlook: Can Privacy Coins Stabilize or Regain Lost Ground?The short-term privacy coin forecast depends on regulatory headlines, Bitcoin stability, and liquidity conditions. Key levels include $0.0968 for SCRT, $415 for ZEC, and $35.14 for DASH.

data.title: U.S. Banks Authorized for Risk-Free Crypto Transactions
data.description: According to Odaily, the Office of the Comptroller of the Currency (OCC) has issued an interpretive letter allowing national banks to engage in 'risk-free principal' cryptocurrency transactions. This regulatory shift permits banks to facilitate crypto trades without holding inventory or assuming market risk, potentially impacting the crypto market significantly. Currently, JPMorgan Chase is exploring the provision of crypto trading services for institutional investors, signaling a move from experimental to implementation phases for Wall Street banks. With regulatory legitimacy and customer trust, banks like JPMorgan could capture a substantial portion of retail order flow, posing competitive pressure on independent crypto exchanges lacking banking licenses.

data.title: Investors Adjust Expectations for Federal Reserve Rate Cuts
data.description: According to Odaily, investors have reduced their bets on the Federal Reserve cutting interest rates next year. The market currently estimates only a 17% chance of a rate cut at the Federal Reserve's meeting on January 28.

data.title: AI Amplifies Phishing Threats in 2025, Report Reveals
data.description: According to PANews, CertiK's recently released '2025 Skynet Hack3D Web3 Security Report' highlights phishing as the most frequent security threat of the year. In 2025, there were 248 recorded phishing incidents, resulting in losses of approximately $723 million. The report emphasizes the role of AI technology in amplifying phishing attacks, with attackers using AI to create highly realistic phishing websites, wallet pop-ups, and multilingual scam messages. These tactics are combined with on-chain data and social media for precise targeting, diminishing the effectiveness of traditional defense methods. The report advises both individual users and project teams to enhance their security awareness and protective measures to counter the escalation of AI-driven attacks.

data.description: According to Lookonchain monitoring, today the US Bitcoin ETF saw a net outflow of 686 BTC, with a 7-day net outflow of 2747 BTC; the Ethereum ETF saw a net outflow of 122 ETH, with a 7-day net outflow of 164861 ETH; and the SOL ETF saw a net inflow of 51975 SOL, with a 7-day net inflow of 319005 SOL.

data.title: Cryptocurrency Hacks in 2025 Lead to $3.3 Billion in Losses
data.description:
According to ChainCatcher, data from blockchain security firm CertiK reveals that cryptocurrency hackers stole $3.3 billion in 2025. Supply chain vulnerabilities emerged as the most destructive threat, with just two incidents accounting for $1.45 billion in losses. The average loss per hack was $5.3 million, marking a 66% increase from the previous year.

However, the data also indicates a significant decrease in the number of security incidents, with 162 fewer cases compared to the previous year. This suggests an improvement in protocol-level security, pushing attackers away from simple code vulnerabilities towards phishing and infrastructure-level attacks. Phishing scams have become the second largest threat, resulting in a total loss of $722 million across 248 incidents for cryptocurrency investors.

data.title: Analysis: The approval granted to banks such as JPMorgan Chase to offer crypto transaction services may reshape the competitive landscape of the market.
data.description: The U.S. Office of the Comptroller of the Currency (OCC) recently issued an explanatory letter confirming that national banks can participate in "risk-free principal" cryptocurrency trading. This allows banks to act as agents for cryptocurrency transactions without holding inventory or assuming market risk, a regulatory shift that will have a significant impact on the cryptocurrency market. JPMorgan Chase is currently exploring providing cryptocurrency trading services to institutional investors, marking a move from the experimental stage to the implementation stage for Wall Street banks in the cryptocurrency space. Leveraging its regulatory legitimacy and customer trust, JPMorgan Chase is expected to absorb a significant portion of retail order flow, particularly posing competitive pressure on independent cryptocurrency exchanges without banking licenses. (CoinDesk)

data.title: US-listed company iPower has reached a $30 million funding agreement to purchase BTC and ETH to establish a DAT strategy.
data.description: Nasdaq-listed iPower announced a $30 million convertible note financing agreement to launch its Digital Asset Treasury (DAT) strategy. The company disclosed that the initial $9 million of this financing will be used, with $4.4 million intended for the purchase of Bitcoin and Ethereum. The remaining funds will be used to increase working capital and bolster the balance sheet. 80% of subsequent funding will be used for continued acquisitions of digital assets. (Globenewswire)

data.title: Trump: The credit for the strong US economic data should be attributed to tariff policy.
data.description: US President Trump stated that tariffs contributed to the recently released excellent US economic data, and the situation will only get better! Furthermore, there is no inflation, and national security is very stable. (Jinshi)

data.title: CertiK releases its annual security report: Web3 losses are projected to increase by 37% year-on-year in 2025, with phishing attacks and supply chain incidents being the main threats.
data.description: Global Web3 security company CertiK released its "2025 Skynet Hack3D Web3 Security Report," summarizing security incidents and risk trends in the Web3 field over the past year. The report shows that 630 security incidents occurred in the Web3 field in 2025, resulting in approximately $3.35 billion in losses, a 37% increase year-over-year. Although the total number of incidents decreased by 137 compared to 2024, the average loss per attack reached $5.322 million, a surge of 66.6% year-over-year, indicating that attackers are focusing on high-value targets. The report points out that market recovery and regulatory clarity have not alleviated security risks, and the Web3 industry still faces systemic threats. In the future, projects that integrate security into their design, development, and operational processes are expected to gain an advantage in the fierce competition.

data.title: Hageman Teases Run for Cynthia Lummis’ Seat With ‘Soon’ Video — What It Means for Crypto
data.description:
Wyoming Rep. Harriet Hageman has fueled speculation about a 2026 Senate run after posting a cryptic “Soon” video, days following Senator Cynthia Lummis’ announcement that she will not seek reelection.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/hageman-run-lummis-senate-crypto/

data.title: U.S. economy sees 4.3% GDP growth in third quarter
data.description:
The U. S. economy expanded by 4. 3% in the third quarter of 2025, based on fresh numbers released Tuesday by the Bureau of Economic Analysis. That growth rate caught most economists off guard, especially since Bloomberg’s survey of forecasters had pegged the number at just 3. 2%. The new GDP data comes after weeks of delay caused […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/u-s-economy-sees-4-3-gdp-growth/
